title: Lyra2 Model Training Step
training_step_flow: x0_fn_A: Lyra2Model.denoise(noise_x, t, condition_A) + denoise(noise_x, t, uncondition_A) → CFG blend
SampleScheduler: step(vt_pred, t, latents) → next latents
→ splice decoded frames back into original video timeline (valid_indices mapping)
→ build epsilon_full [zeros on history frames T<T_hist, randn on generated region T>=T_hist]
→ [CP group] broadcast(x0_latents, epsilon_full, t_B, condition) across CP ranks
→ compute MSE loss: mean((vt_pred_gen - vt[:,:,T_hist:])^2) weighted by time_weights_B
tokenizing_video_to_latents_flow: → _prepare_video_window(video, start, cur_segment_id) → (video_win, video_indices, start, cur_segment_id, chunk_len)
[self_aug/stage-B] → vae_encode_with_cache(cache_T-2, prev_chunk), vae_encode_with_cache(cache, zeros), vae_encode_with_cache(cache_T-1, curr_chunk)
[num_spatial_hist > 0] → Sparse3DCache.add(depth, camera_w2c, intrinsics) for selected stride frames
→ _prepare_lyra2_inputs(history_full, gen_cond, spatial_cache, video, buffer_depth, camera_w2c, intrinsics, video_indices, is_training=True)
→ [warp pipeline] forward_warp_multiframes / unproject_points for spatial correspondences
Step 5 – GT tail splice: latents[:,:,:T_hist] + gen_gt
prepare_video_window_flow: [start is None] → random start ∈ [0, video_length * starting_frame_ratio)
[start+chunk_len > video_length] → pad-right by repeating last frame
[to_repeat_front > 0] → prepend first frame repeated to_repeat_front times
compute_spatial_history_positions_flow: Collects integer latent positions where kernel_type == 's' (spatial kernel)
Returns tuple of those positions (used for dropout/corruption indexing)
get_x0_fn_from_batch_flow: → vt_full = zeros_like(noise_x); vt_full[:,:,T_hist:] = gen_v  [zero history region]

key_data_structures.framepack_params: dict with framepack_indices (arange), framepack_splits (list), framepack_kernel_ids (list), framepack_kernel_types (list) — injected to every net() call
key_data_structures.latents shape: [B, C, T_total, H_lat, W_lat] where T_total = T_hist + T_new
key_data_structures.cond_latent shape: [B, C+C_plucker, T_total, H_lat, W_lat] — concatenates VAE latent + Plucker ray encoding
key_data_structures.epsilon_full: history region = x0 (clean), gen region = randn noise
key_data_structures.loss: time-weighted MSE only on generated region vt[:,:,T_hist:]

key_config_fields: framepack_type: str  e.g. 'f16k4f2k2f1k1_g3' — encodes history latent splits and kernel types (k=temporal, s=spatial)
num_frames_per_latent: int  [default 4] — video tokenizer temporal stride
max_segments: int  [default 10] — max AR window segments
starting_frame_ratio: float  [default 0.1] — fraction of video for start sampling
self_aug_enabled: bool  [default False] — enables Stage-A self-augmentation
multibuffer_max_spatial_frames: Optional[int] — max spatial history slots
key_relationships: Lyra2Model inherits WANDiffusionModel (training_step, get_x0_fn_from_batch, get_data_and_condition fully overridden)
Lyra2Model depends_on RectifiedFlow (sample_train_time, get_sigmas, get_interpolation, train_time_weight)
Lyra2Model depends_on Sparse3DCache (spatial history frames, warp pipeline)
Lyra2Model uses SampleScheduler (inference only, set_timesteps, step)
important_notes: Loss is computed ONLY over the generated region (T>=T_hist); history latents are clean x0. CP (context parallel) is handled internally by the net after Lyra2 patchify — no temporal split before net() call. framepack_params dict is passed verbatim to every net() forward. Spatial positions are those latent slots with kernel_type=='s' in the framepack_type string.
